name: Koil Energy Solutions, Inc.
summary: Koil Energy Solutions, Inc. is a Nevada-based energy services company providing equipment and support services to offshore energy and marine industries. Core offerings include steel tube flying leads (LSFL), umbilical termination assemblies, bend stiffener latchers, spooling services, testing and commissioning, storage management, and equipment refurbishment. Products serve major integrated, large independent, and foreign national energy companies in offshore oil and gas, with capabilities applicable to offshore wind, hydrogen, and LNG markets.

products.name: Loose Steel Tube Flying Lead (LSFL)
products.description: Umbilical jumper with termination plates transmitting hydraulic fluid and chemicals between subsea equipment, designed to lay flat on the sea floor.

products.name: Moray Termination System
products.description: Lightweight, high-strength, configurable, field-serviceable framework connecting multi-quick connect plates to the LSFL bundle.

products.name: Umbilical Termination Assembly (UTA)
products.description: Compliant, lightweight umbilical hardware covering topside platform to subsea connection with stab and hinge-over features.

products.name: Bend Stiffener Latchers
products.description: Secures dynamic umbilicals to existing flanges; operable by a single ROV without rig modification or divers.

products.name: Spooling Services
products.description: Engineering planning, supervision, and coordination for pull-in and spooling of umbilicals and flying leads.

products.name: Testing and Commissioning Services
products.description: Factory acceptance testing, system integration testing, and offshore installation and commissioning for subsea systems.

products.name: Storage Management
products.description: Warehousing, external storage, material handling, inventory management, packing, and labeling at Houston facility.

products.name: Equipment Refurbishment and Intervention Services
products.description: Refurbishment and repurposing of recovered subsea equipment, engineered and tested per customer specifications for offshore interventions.

products.name: Project Management and Engineering
products.description: Design and engineering of steel tube flying leads, umbilicals, risers, flowlines, and jumpers with offshore installation support.
